name: delete_story
description: Permanently delete a story from the Storyblok space. This action cannot be undone -- the story, all its versions, and associated content will be removed. Use with caution. This endpoint requires a Management API token.

parameters.name: space_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the Storyblok space.

parameters.name: story_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the story to delete. Obtain from list_stories or get_story.
